name: stackiq-plugin
description: StackIQ: weekly AI/SaaS utilization diagnostic. A 5-stage read-then-act pipeline that audits tool spend/adoption, finds idle seats, tier mismatches, overlap, and shadow-IT, sizes findings in dollars/seats/accounts, ships an Excel workbook + CEO deck, and executes approved remediations behind a human-approval gate. Supports named-tool audits and full-stack auto-discovery (MCP + SSO + expense, reconciled) with a triage-then-deep-dive pass. MCP-first, Chrome/file fallback. No API keys.
